name: Review Summary
description: A section on a review page that displays answers from a completed form step. Shows question-answer pairs with the ability to change each section before final submission.
whenToUse: Displaying completed form data for verification
When users need to see all their answers in one place
Allowing quick navigation back to specific sections to make changes

components.name: Section Header
components.purpose: Identify the form section being displayed
components.usage: h3 with section title and Change link

components.name: Change Link
components.usage: Button styled as link, includes screen reader context

structure.content: Question-answer pairs in definition list format

example.description: Review summary section showing personal information answers

variants.name: With nested data
variants.description: Display repeater fields like multiple children with sub-lists

variants.name: With inline editing
variants.description: Allow editing directly on review page without navigation

variants.name: Condensed view
variants.description: Single line per section for simpler forms

considerations: Always show 'Not provided' for empty optional fields (not blank)
Include hidden text for screen readers on Change links
Format dates, phones, and other data types for readability
Pass return=review query param so step knows to return here
Use semantic dl/dt/dd for accessible question-answer structure
Keep question text identical to original form for recognition
Consider mobile layout - stack question/answer on small screens
